title: Tome V Act 3: The Shielded Memo

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 3: The Shielded Memo
**act** · swordsman · narrative

Memora inscribes the chronicle into Zcash; the chain remembers.
> *The chain remembers. You decide who else gets to.*
